Overview/backstory:
Amara is a popular creator, mostly for her amazing singing and erotic rapping... but She’s always had an nasty attitude and was obviously a bully/bullied when she was a young lad… success seems to have made that worse, so her boss usually have to do events to steer her nasty attitude away from the public. Amara is trans, grew up as a boy but always knew deep down she was a girl - but living in a toxic black household with hardly any love and homophobic parents is what made her this attitude, and growing up she’s actually never had a good or great relationship before.
